Video.summary: Are you ready to have dust devils, tornadoes, floods, and thunderstorms flashing before your eyes? You'd better be, because you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, where we waste no time filling your screen with the most intense weather events caught on camera.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Video.summary: What's the only place where it rains, snows, and storms every single day? You guessed it, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown, and we're back with a brand new lineup of astonishing weather footage.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | When Hail Freezes Over

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | When Hail Freezes Over
Extreme Weather Countdown | When Hail Freezes Over
Extreme Weather Countdown | When Hail Freezes Over

Video.summary: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Video.summary: Jaclyn joins Mark in a ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific tornado season on record.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.summary: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: Jaclyn joins Mark in a ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific tornado season on record.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Video.summary: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Landfall!

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.title: Storm Hunters | True North Strong

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.summary: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Video.summary: Alaskan bush pilots risk everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Video.summary: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Into The Deep

Video.summary: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Desperate Times

Video.summary: Check out these hair-raising occurrences brought upon by nature.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Hair-Raising Experience

Video.summary: Aftermath devastation, raging flames, gale-force winds, and deadly avalanches strike with brutal force.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Unleashed Earth

Video.summary: Those that thrive beneath the waves teach us to go with the flow.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.13

Video.summary: From oceans to rivers to kiddie pools, aquatic life finds a way.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.5
